summary: Verified cart cookie fix - all 9 requested features working. Backend sets Secure flag on cookies when behind HTTPS proxy (x-forwarded-proto header). Frontend axios.defaults.withCredentials=true ensures cookies sent with all requests. Full flow tested: login -> add to cart -> cart counter updates -> cart sheet shows items -> checkout shows items -> cart persists after reload.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute - accessibility warning in console

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login returns Set-Cookie with Secure flag when behind HTTPS proxy
GET /api/auth/me works after login (cookie sent back)
POST /api/cart/add successfully adds product to cart
Frontend: Login flow works - user gets redirected and sees their name
Frontend: Add to cart shows toast and increments cart counter in header
Frontend: Cart sheet opens and shows added items
Frontend: Checkout page shows cart items with total
Frontend: Cart counter persists after page reload
Guest cart works with cart_session cookie
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding Description component or aria-describedby prop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart cookie fix verified working. Key changes: (1) axios.defaults.withCredentials=true in App.js ensures all requests send cookies, (2) Backend get_cookie_secure() auto-detects HTTPS via x-forwarded-proto header and sets Secure flag accordingly, (3) Both access_token and cart_session cookies use dynamic secure flag. All cart operations (add, update, remove, clear) working. Checkout page shows cart items correctly. Cart persists across page reloads.

verification_details.cookie_secure_flag: Verified - Set-Cookie header includes 'Secure' flag when x-forwarded-proto: https
verification_details.axios_withCredentials: true - set globally in App.js and AuthContext.js
verification_details.cart_counter_update: Verified - counter increments from 0 to 2 after adding items
verification_details.cart_persistence: Verified - counter shows 2 after page reload
verification_details.checkout_items: Verified - shows Dell XPS 15 x2 at $3598.00
